title: Gruyere Broil
description: A simple and rich broil recipe featuring Gruyere cheese. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: Place broil slices under broiler and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Flip broil slices and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Place cooked broil slices on a plate and top with Gruyere cheese.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt over the top.
